overview.title: Welcome.
overview.subtitle: Buy directly from Moroccan producers. VitaChain handles the logistics and keeps your exchanges anonymous.
overview.step1Body: Filter by region, price, and type — add to your cart.
overview.step2Body: Indicate your delivery region. Your contact details stay private.
overview.step3Body: We forward the order, collect the products, and deliver.
overview.step4Body: Cash on delivery or a consolidated transfer at month end.

help.title: How does FarMarket work?
help.subtitle: VitaChain is the logistics intermediary between Moroccan agricultural producers and restaurants. We never put the two parties in direct contact.
help.step1Body: Filter by region, price per kilo, and product type. Save listings you're interested in to your favorites.
help.step2Body: You can mix several producers in the same order — we coordinate the pickups for you.
help.step3Body: We forward your order to producers (anonymized), collect the goods, and organize transport to your establishment.
help.step4Body: Check conformity upon receipt. In case of a dispute, contact VitaChain support — you never have to deal with the producer directly.
help.whyAnonymityBody: By hiding the identity of producers and restaurants, VitaChain protects each party against unfair commercial practices (dumped prices, direct solicitation, breach of contract). This is what guarantees a fair price at the production end and controlled quality for your kitchens.
help.bullet1: Your contact details (name, phone, address) are never passed on to producers.
help.bullet2: Producers' identities are only revealed on delivery, via the delivery note.
help.bullet3: Delivery notes are filtered to avoid exposing contact information.
help.faq1A: 5% of the subtotal with a minimum of 50 MAD per order. This amount covers pickup, transport, and the quality of the goods all the way to your door.
help.faq2A: 24 to 48 h on average depending on the region. Orders in the Casablanca/Rabat area are usually delivered the next day. You can track progress from your order page.
help.faq3A: Two options are available: (1) Cash on delivery, in cash or by check payable to VitaChain, handed to the courier against a signed receipt. (2) Secure transfer via PayMaroc, our payment provider licensed by Bank Al-Maghrib — you pay online by card or instant transfer before the order is forwarded to producers.
help.faq4A: Yes, as long as the order is in "Pending" status. Once accepted by producers, a cancellation may incur a fee.
help.faq5Q: What if the goods don't meet expectations?
help.faq5A: Refuse the delivery upon receipt or contact VitaChain within 24 h. We handle the dispute with the producer — you are fully refunded in the event of a confirmed defect.
help.ctaBody: Activate your verified account to raise your order limits and access premium producers.

notifications.title: Your order activity.
notifications.subtitle: All events related to your orders — from placement to delivery. Producer identities remain hidden.
notifications.emptyBody: As soon as you place your first order, its activity will appear here.
notifications.footerNote: You can also receive these notifications by email — enable the option in your preferences (coming soon).
notifications.createdBody: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} · {amount} MAD
notifications.acceptedPartialBody: Partially accepted — some lines were not honored.
notifications.acceptedFullBody: All producers have confirmed your order.
notifications.deliveredBody: Please confirm receipt from the order page.
notifications.rejectedBody: Producers were unable to fulfill the order.

page.title: Your establishment.
page.subtitle: Profile information, delivery preferences, and verification status.
page.profileNote: This information is used solely by VitaChain to coordinate your deliveries. It is never shared with producers.
page.verifiedBody: You can order without restriction and access premium producers.
page.unverifiedBody: Validating your RC or ICE is required to raise your order limits and access premium producers.

detail.disputeBodyBeforeEmail: Contact VitaChain support within 24 h of delivery at
detail.disputeBodyAfterEmail: or at +212 5 22 00 00 00. We handle the dispute with the producer — you are fully refunded in the event of a confirmed defect.

confirmation.step2Body: Our carrier collects the goods and consolidates them for your establishment.
confirmation.step3Body: Check conformity, then confirm receipt from the order page.

paymentEcho.codPaidSubtitle: Paid in {instrument} to the VitaChain courier.
paymentEcho.codDueBody: Please have the exact amount ready if possible. A signed receipt will be given to you by the VitaChain courier upon delivery.
paymentEcho.pspFailedBody: Your last {partner} payment did not go through. Try again to release the order.
paymentEcho.pspPendingBody: You chose to pay via {partner}. Resume the payment so VitaChain can forward your order to producers.

pay.dataNotice: Your banking details are not stored by VitaChain. They are transmitted encrypted to {partner}.

receipt.title: Order slip
receipt.footerNote: Producer identities are kept confidential in accordance with the platform's logistics terms.

paymentTerms.codPaidBody: Paid by {instrument} to the VitaChain courier. Signed receipt issued upon delivery.
paymentTerms.codDueAmount: Amount due to the courier · {amount} MAD
paymentTerms.codDueBody: Paid by {instrument}. The courier issues a signed receipt upon delivery. No amount is ever due to the producer directly.
paymentTerms.pspPaidBody: Transaction secured by 3-D Secure. The settled invoice is attached to this order slip.
paymentTerms.pspFailedBody: Please try again from your dashboard. The order remains on hold until payment is confirmed.
paymentTerms.pspPendingBody: Resume payment from your dashboard — the order will only be forwarded to producers once payment is confirmed.
